title: Déline Final Self-Government Agreement Act
description: Déline Final Self-Government Agreement Act (Déline Final Self-Government Agreemen...). Current to 2026-02-04.

provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content: 1 This Act may be cited as the Déline Final Self-Government Agreement Act .

provisions.title: Definitions
provisions.content: 2 The following definitions apply in this Act. Déline Agreement Déline Agreement means the Déline Final Self-Government Agreement among the Déline First Nation Band, the Déline Land Corporation, the Government of Canada and the Government of the Northwest Territories, signed on February 18, 2015, including any amendments made to it. ( accord de Deline ) Déline First Nation Band Déline First Nation Band has the same meaning as in chapter 1 of the Déline Agreement. ( bande de la Première Nation de Deline ) Déline Got’ine Government Déline Got’ine Government means the government established in accordance with chapter 3 of the Déline Agreement. ( gouvernement Gotine de Deline ) Déline Land Corporation Déline Land Corporation has the same meaning as in chapter 1 of the Déline Agreement. ( société foncière de Deline ) Déline law Déline law has the meaning assigned by the definition DGG Law in chapter 1 of the Déline Agreement. ( loi de Deline ) Déline Tax Treatment Agreement Déline Tax Treatment Agreement means the tax treatment agreement referred to in 22.3.1 of the Déline Agreement, including any amendments made to it. ( accord sur le traitement fiscal de Deline ) Sahtu Agreement Sahtu Agreement means the Agreement as defined in section 2 of the Sahtu Dene and Metis Land Claim Settlement Act . ( accord du Sahtu )

provisions.title: Status of Déline Agreement
provisions.content: 3 The Déline Agreement is a treaty within the meaning of sections 25 and 35 of the Constitution Act, 1982 .

provisions.title: Déline Agreement given effect
provisions.content: 4 (1) The Déline Agreement is approved, given effect and declared valid and has the force of law. (2) For greater certainty, a person or entity has the powers, rights, privileges and benefits conferred on the person or entity by the Déline Agreement and must perform the duties, and is subject to the liabilities, imposed on the person or entity by the Déline Agreement. (3) For greater certainty, the Déline Agreement is binding on, and may be relied on by, all persons and entities.

provisions.title: Déline Agreement prevails
provisions.content: 5 (1) Subject to section 6, the Déline Agreement prevails over this Act and any other federal law to the extent of any inconsistency between them. (2) Subject to section 7, this Act prevails over any other federal law to the extent of any conflict between them.

provisions.title: Inconsistency with Déline Agreement
provisions.content: 6 The Sahtu Dene and Metis Land Claim Settlement Act and the Sahtu Agreement prevail over the Déline Agreement to the extent of any inconsistency between that Act and the Déline Agreement or between the Sahtu Agreement and the Déline Agreement.

provisions.title: Inconsistency with this Act
provisions.content: 7 The Sahtu Dene and Metis Land Claim Settlement Act and the Sahtu Agreement prevail over this Act to the extent of any inconsistency between that Act and this Act or between the Sahtu Agreement and this Act.

provisions.title: Inconsistency with Déline law
provisions.content: 8 The Sahtu Dene and Metis Land Claim Settlement Act and the Sahtu Agreement prevail over Déline law to the extent of any inconsistency between that Act and Déline law or between the Sahtu Agreement and Déline law.

provisions.title: Capacity of natural person
provisions.content: 9 The Déline Got’ine Government is a legal entity and has the capacity, rights, powers and privileges of a natural person.

provisions.title: Force of law
provisions.content: 10 Déline law that is made in accordance with the Déline Agreement has the force of law.

provisions.title: Force of law
provisions.content: 11 (1) In this section, Déline First Nation Citizen has the meaning assigned by the definition DFN Citizen in chapter 1 of the Déline Agreement. (2) Subject to 2.8 of the Déline Agreement, the Indian Act does not apply to the Déline Got’ine Government or to Déline First Nation Citizens as of the day on which section 4 comes into force.

provisions.title: Statutory Instruments Act
provisions.content: 12 A Déline law is not a statutory instrument for the purposes of the Statutory Instruments Act .

provisions.title: Déline Tax Treatment Agreement
provisions.content: 13 The Déline Tax Treatment Agreement is approved, given effect and declared valid and has the force of law during the period that it is in effect.

provisions.title: Clarification
provisions.content: 14 The Déline Tax Treatment Agreement does not form part of the Déline Agreement and it is not a treaty or a land claims agreement within the meaning of sections 25 and 35 of the Constitution Act, 1982 .

provisions.title: Judicial notice — Agreements
provisions.content: 15 (1) Judicial notice must be taken of the Déline Agreement and the Déline Tax Treatment Agreement. (2) The Déline Agreement and the Déline Tax Treatment Agreement must be published by the Queen’s Printer. (3) A copy of the Déline Agreement or the Déline Tax Treatment Agreement published by the Queen’s Printer is evidence of that agreement and of its contents, and a copy purporting to be published by the Queen’s Printer is presumed to be so published unless the contrary is shown.

provisions.title: Judicial notice — Déline law
provisions.content: 16 (1) Judicial notice must be taken of any Déline law that is registered in the public registry referred to in 3.7 of the Déline Agreement. (2) A copy of any Déline law purporting to be deposited in the public registry referred to in 3.7 of the Déline Agreement is evidence of that law and of its contents, unless the contrary is shown. Meaning of institutions

provisions.title: Evidence
provisions.content: 17 (1) In this section, institutions has the meaning assigned by the definition Institutions of the DGG in chapter 1 of the Déline Agreement. (2) The Déline Got’ine Government and its institutions are not federal boards, commissions or other tribunals as defined in subsection 2(1) of the Federal Courts Act . (3) The Supreme Court of the Northwest Territories has exclusive original jurisdiction to hear and determine applications for judicial review of the decisions of the Déline Got’ine Government or its institutions, except if an agreement made in accordance with 22.2.2 of the Déline Agreement provides otherwise.

provisions.title: Notice of issues arising
provisions.content: 18 (1) If an issue arises in any judicial or administrative proceeding in respect of the interpretation, validity or applicability of the Déline Agreement, of this Act, of the Act of the legislature of the Northwest Territories that gives effect to the Déline Agreement or of any Déline law, then the issue must not be decided until the party raising the issue has served notice on the Attorney General of Canada, the Attorney General of the Northwest Territories and the Déline Got’ine Government. (2) The notice must (a) describe the proceeding; (b) state the subject matter of the issue; (c) state the day on which the issue is to be argued; (d) give the particulars that are necessary to show the point to be argued; and (e) be served at least 14 days before the day on which the issue is to be argued, unless the court or tribunal authorizes a shorter period. (3) The Attorney General of Canada, the Attorney General of the Northwest Territories and the Déline Got’ine Government may appear and participate in any proceeding in respect of which subsection (1) applies as parties with the same rights as any other party. (4) For greater certainty, subsections (2) and (3) do not require that an oral hearing be held if one is not otherwise required.

provisions.title: Retroactive effect
provisions.content: 19 Despite subsection 4(1), 2.5.1 and 4.6 of the Déline Agreement, chapter 31 of that Agreement and 2.1, 2.2, 3.3, 5.1 and 5.2 of schedule C to that Agreement are deemed to have effect as of October 1, 2013.

provisions.title: Orders and regulations
provisions.content: 20 The Governor in Council may make any orders and regulations that are necessary for the purpose of carrying out any of the provisions of the Déline Agreement or of any other agreements that are related to the implementation of the Déline Agreement.

provisions.chapter: Payments in Lieu of Taxes Act
provisions.title: Orders and regulations

provisions.chapter: First Nations Goods and Services Tax Act

provisions.title: Order in council
provisions.content: 43 The provisions of this Act, other than sections 19 and 42, come into force on a day or days to be fixed by order of the Governor in Council. Return to footnote * [Note: Sections 1 to 18 and 20 to 41 in force September 1, 2016, see SI/2016-22.] Page Details Date modified: 2026-02-18 Justice Laws Website Constitutional Documents Related Resources Consolidated Acts and Regulations Search Help Contact Us Department of Justice Canada Family Law Criminal Justice Funding Canada's System of Justice Laws Government of Canada All contacts Departments and agencies About government Themes and topics Jobs Immigration and citizenship Travel and tourism Business Benefits Health Taxes Environment and natural resources National security and defence Culture, history and sport Policing, justice and emergencies Transport and infrastructure Canada and the world Money and finance Science and innovation Indigenous peoples Veterans and military Youth Social media Mobile applications About Canada.ca Terms and conditions Privacy Top of Page _satellite.pageBottom();

definitions.definition: Déline Agreement means the Déline Final Self-Government Agreement among the Déline First Nation Band, the Déline Land Corporation, the Government of Canada and the Government of the Northwest Territories, signed on February 18, 2015, including any amendments made to it. ( accord de Deline )
Déline First Nation Band has the same meaning as in chapter 1 of the Déline Agreement. ( bande de la Première Nation de Deline )
Déline Got’ine Government means the government established in accordance with chapter 3 of the Déline Agreement. ( gouvernement Gotine de Deline )
Déline Land Corporation has the same meaning as in chapter 1 of the Déline Agreement. ( société foncière de Deline )
Déline law has the meaning assigned by the definition DGG Law in chapter 1 of the Déline Agreement. ( loi de Deline )
Déline Tax Treatment Agreement means the tax treatment agreement referred to in 22.3.1 of the Déline Agreement, including any amendments made to it. ( accord sur le traitement fiscal de Deline )
Sahtu Agreement means the Agreement as defined in section 2 of the Sahtu Dene and Metis Land Claim Settlement Act . ( accord du Sahtu )
